sections.heading: Clinical Note
sections.section_value:
Chief Complaint
Left hand pain
History of Present Illness
The patient reports pain in the left hand, rated 7-8 in severity. He reports the pain began yesterday following a soccer injury. The patient also reports foot pain and numbness and tingling. He has played soccer for a long time and started playing in a local town.
Findings
Examination reveals left hand pain. Examination also reveals foot pain and numbness and tingling.
Assessment
The patient has a soccer injury and reports left hand pain, foot pain, numbness, and tingling.
Plan
Start ibuprofen. Follow up in four weeks if symptoms persist.
